clips.title: Good Good Treasure Hunt Golf Challenge
clips.description:
Good Good Treasure Hunt Golf Challenge

This golfer's brutally honest review of a weird shot will leave you laughing.

Good Good is golf's biggest entertainment crew — pro-am matches, challenges and big-personality competition from a team of creators and ex-college players.

Clip from “Good Good” ▶ Full video on their channel.

#goodgood #golf #shorts #golfchallenges #funnygolf #golftv
